findings.title: search_files symlink traversal
findings.notes: search_files follows symlinks outside jupyter_root_dir. Still unfixed on main. PR #26 open.

findings.title: PR review workflow vulnerable to prompt injection via diff content
findings.notes: LLM prompt embeds PR diff without injection-resistant framing; unvalidated output posted as PR comment. Fix: untrusted-content delimiters, system instruction hardening, comment disclaimer.

findings.title: list_files enumerates host files through workspace symlinks
findings.notes: list_files uses Path.glob() which follows symlinks without resolving matches against workspace root. Same class as #13 (search_files) but in a different function not covered by PR #26. Fix: resolve each glob match and reject outside workspace.

surfaces_reviewed: MCP stdio command policy (allowlist + env key denylist)
GitHub skill import (redirect restrictions + tar extraction safety)
File upload (basename + UUID isolation + size limits)
Anchor URI validation (scheme allowlist + control char filtering)
TOCTOU race conditions (same-user, no privilege boundary)
list_files glob confinement (symlink traversal via Path.glob)
no_new_findings_reason: One new medium finding: list_files symlink traversal (built_in_toolsets.py). Same class as #13 but distinct function. Existing findings #13/#18/#27 confirmed still open. All other attack surfaces remain mitigated.
